title: transport auth handshake has no deadline; ping flood blocks it indefinitely
description: core/src/transport.rs: recv_text_frame (line 585) loops on ping/pong frames without any deadline. ws_upgrade_and_auth calls it twice (lines 362, 445) with no surrounding tokio::time::timeout. A rogue relay that continuously sends WebSocket Ping frames will keep the auth handshake in the loop forever, blocking the spawned mining task and the caller. This differs from nie-li9e.3 (wasm-specific): this is the native transport path. Fix: wrap each recv_text_frame call with tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_secs(30), ...) and convert the Elapsed error to anyhow::Error.
